Blade of Abrogation  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 39
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +7 INT: +3
WT: 7.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Blade of Abrogation
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 39
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +7 INT: +3
WT: 7.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Yukitaro Antslayer
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:04
Page Updated:Sun Jul 21st, 2019

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Sky
NPC Name
a blade storm
a fatestealer drake
a gorgalask
a heartsbane drake
a soul harvester
a soul tamer
a thunder spirit
a thunder spirit princess
a windrider drake
an azarack
an essence carrier
an essence tamer
Bazzzazzt
Bizazzzt
Eye of Veeshan
Gorgalosk
heart harpie
Protector of Sky
Sister of the Spire
The Spiroc Lord

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

The Overthere
Quest Name
Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Sky


Uploaded September 19th, 2019 by iventheassassin

Post Comment
Blade can be traded on FV
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2020 at 12:38 AM Rating: Excellent
Vedarian
Guru
186 posts
It's only Lore on FV. I was asking about it in general chat and someone had collected a couple doing a different epic and they gave me one!
▲ Page top
Finally
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2019 at 9:14 AM Rating: Good
kunshada
7 posts
Dropped for me last night 7/14/2019 from a drake. Good luck and happy hunting all.
▲ Page top
Dropped off the griffon "an essence carrier"
QuoteReply
# May 26 2019 at 7:08 PM Rating: Good
DoctaJay
Sage
90 posts
Dropped today on Selo server off the griffon "an essence carrier". Cleared the first 3 islands with no luck.
▲ Page top
BoA
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2014 at 11:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1620001341346
19 posts
Cleared first isle once, moved to azaracks, cleared once then onto gorgalosk isle which I cleared twice and no sign of this blade. Having spent 2 weeks in Fear for another SK epic piece I was impatient and decided to try Pegasus. Pulled a Soul Carrier to northern corner and the blade dropped from an essence tamer (one of the spawns when you kill the griffon).

I decided to update this thread and in doing so I lost the chance to loot the next key piece on my box character (doh!) so I pulled an essence harvester and another blade dropped from a soul harvester. So I would recommend working up to Pegasus for this blade.
▲ Page top
Got Blade of Abrogation FAST!!!
QuoteReply
# May 20 2018 at 7:05 PM Rating: Good
Galadrena
Scholar
33 posts
I tried this exact tactic. Got to Pegasus Island, pulled a soul carrier (Griffon) to a safe corner. When he died two more mobs spawned both an essence carrier. The first essence I killed dropped the Blade and off the Island I jumped, LOL.
▲ Page top
had 3 blades on Pegasus isle in 1 clearing
QuoteReply
# May 03 2011 at 10:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592792297721
60 posts
I actually got my BoA for my SK from Gorgalosk after 3 clearings from 1st three isles. It took me couple of days to get one. Once I was done with SK epic, I was trying to get a robe for my necro. While clearing the Pegasus isle and for keeper, I found 3 BoAs in corpses. I recommend clearing Pegasus isle first to get BoA.

# Jan 18 2009 at 4:00 PM Rating: Decent
meralin
Scholar
122 posts
Just dropped off of *Bizazzzt* along with half my group when ha ha. 1/18/09

Feel free to nail me with your flames .. check my spelling .. punctuation .. what ever makes you happy. I am not here for an E-***** building Experience ... these forums are for info not Ego's.
▲ Page top
3rd Level Spirited Harpy holding my loot!
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2008 at 11:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591965343123
4 posts
Just got this for my sk epic today. Was with my ranger friend helping with his epic too. Cleared the first island and decided to just keep moving on. On the 3rd island a Spirited Harpy was holding the sword outside the little tower. Coned light blue to a 62 lv sk and average hit was around 200. Pulled her and aggroed one of the eye mobs. Careful he has a dispel magic. Canceled all my buffs. No biggie though, killed her anyway!

As a side note we had to end up fighting the mobs inside the tower, they killed my pet (but I managed a comatose). Couldn't revive him. Said "That the spell does not work here." Also couldn't use my drakkin breath ability either. Ranger couldn't use harmony or levitate, but the adds weren't that bad.

Went to forth level and tried to kill the "Overseer of Air". Bad idea folks death touched my Ranger friend for 94,000 pts of dmg. Lmao!!! When you are ready to leave just jump off the side. End up in East Freeport in the water.

Hope this helps!
▲ Page top
WTS MQ
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2008 at 5:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591959314511
3 posts
Mq'ed today

thunderspirits
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2007 at 1:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791412167
46 posts
Got this for my SK today. It took 12 rounds of killing all the fairies.
Oh, it was on the spirit princess.



Edited, Sep 3rd 2007 5:37pm by GuraGetcha
▲ Page top
Still drops from thunder spirits
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2007 at 5:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592265278976
Scholar
130 posts
Finally got this drop for my sk. Like the posts below say, it took a few wipes of the first island to get this. For 3 days, I would wipe the first island in the morning before work, then wipe again after work, then wipe one more time before bed. On the 3rd day, right after work, I ran around the island to see if any of the thunder spirts were holding a sword and there it was, in the hands of a plain old thunder spirit (not the princess). This particular spirit was hovering above one of the teleport pads but I don't think that matters, I think it could have appeared with any mob there.

Killed the mob, and the BoA was there amongst the tiny swords and rabbits feet.

Good luck with your own quests,
Jaton/Shadome
▲ Page top
Unlisted
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2007 at 3:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591931970231
View User Forum
Scholar
76 posts
But just got it off an azrack on the second island.
▲ Page top
Got it
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2007 at 3:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1657498612547
Scholar
69 posts
Ok..probably the hardest drop for me was this one. I wiped all but the princess on the first island once. Then my Enchanter parnter came up to help kill her. We camped there and wiped it again in the morning...then i took a mini raid up there and wiped the Sword island.
By this point i had had enough. I went back up tonight just for fun basically. Killed 2 thunder spirits and just by chance when to the princess to rest...i looked up and there it was, in her hand! It was a crazy fight. She resisted snare, but i got 2 fire dots on her. Popped a HoT potion and life tapped down some. I got down to about 30% and popped Unholy disc and HTed her. Was down to about 20% by then so i popped Leech curse and killed her...WOW! LOL

Maymm, 60 SK, Poetic Changes of Stromm

it cant' be to rare. i got 2 to drop in 5min on pegusus island. harvesters drop'd them both times.

Scholar
22 posts
well after several months of trying to get this (still have not gotten it to drop) I have been informed the SK epic 1.0 is broken anyway, specifically in The Hole where you turn in the cell key to spawn Kyrenna; her buddy refuses to take the key and she does not spawn. Yay SOE, another reason to be totally annoyed. well time to get some raid forces together to do the Prequest and 1.5

Blade drop

# Jun 18 2006 at 1:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591888187683
Scholar
22 posts
Been trying to get the Blade of Abrogation to drop for several weeks now. After the 2 server patches (6/13/06 and 6/16/06) I still have not seen this drop. I have seen the monk drop and several class specific haste belts. I have cleared this island at least 25 times now (stopped keeping track after that). This is now bordering on ridiculous for an epic 1.0 drop.

Blade drop

# Jul 07 2006 at 2:06 AM Rating: Decent

Took me about three days , cleared four islands three times each.

Beware, if it drops from a pegasus pet it won't be on a 30 minute corpse timer.

Kalysta
Scholar
1,087 posts
which island?

Best way to get this sword, is one of two ways.

Zone up once in a while, check is princess is weilding it.
or
Camp on Pegasus island. They seem to drop it the most.

22 posts
Still havent gotten blade to drop and to add insult to all of this, I was soloing on pegasus island last nite and was on my way to killing the 5th mob when he summons me off the island behind him and I was right in front of him! I think it take less time to get the resources together and do the 1.5/20 prequest and 1.5 then to keep trying to get this ridiculous drop for 1.0.

# Jun 12 2006 at 10:02 PM Rating: Decent

▲ Page top
First Island
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2006 at 6:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1678061973798
View User Forum
Scholar
45 posts
Blade of Abrogation in Sky was easiest piece. camped up there on the first island, cleared the fairies then took the princess. they all respawn in roughly 5 hours. also got a cool sk only haste belt. if you have any other 46+ char, camp them up on the first isle. some cool stuff drops (class specific no drop) haste belts, paladin neck, shaman cup, caster bracers, whitened treant fists for monk. on my 10th island clear, the Princess was holding my Blade so took her down..came back 5 hrs later..she had another. ported a guildie up to loot. mob who has the sword WILL BE holding it, so you know that they have it.
▲ Page top
